Home.title: LUMIÈRE Candles
Home.aboutText1: LUMIÈRE is born out of a passion for luxury, warm light, and soothing aromas. Every single candle is meticulously hand-poured using premium natural soy wax, lead-free cotton wicks, and the finest fragrance oils.
Home.aboutText2: Our mission is to bring warmth, elegance, and tranquility into your living spaces. Experience the gentle flame and sensory delight of a truly handcrafted masterpiece designed to illuminate your most cherished moments.

Catalog.title: Our Collection
Catalog.subtitle: Immerse yourself in the gentle glow of our hand-poured soy candles.
Catalog.noProducts: No products found in this category.

classic-lavender.name: Classic Lavender
classic-lavender.description: Soothing organic lavender scent, perfect for relaxation and evening wind-down.

royal-crimson.name: Royal Crimson (Velvet Rose & Oud)
royal-crimson.description: A rich, mysterious blend of velvet damask rose wrapped in smoky oud wood and amber.

golden-glow.name: Golden Glow (Amber & Vanilla)
golden-glow.description: Warm, comforting notes of baltic amber combined with sweet, rich Madagascan vanilla.

forest-mist.name: Forest Mist (Cedarwood & Pine)
forest-mist.description: Fresh and earthy aroma of rain-soaked pine needles, cedarwood, and herbal notes.

midnight-jasmine.name: Midnight Jasmine
midnight-jasmine.description: An alluring, sweet floral scent of blooming night jasmine with a touch of white musk.

spiced-cinnamon.name: Spiced Cinnamon & Honey
spiced-cinnamon.description: Cozy scent of warm ground cinnamon, spiced cloves, and a drizzle of sweet organic honey.

citrus-breeze.name: Citrus Breeze (Orange & Bergamot)
citrus-breeze.description: Uplifting and refreshing zesty bergamot blended with sweet orange blossom.

sacred-sandalwood.name: Sacred Sandalwood
sacred-sandalwood.description: Earthy, woodsy sandalwood base with soft undertones of patchouli and clean musk.
